title: Seeded Asteroid Generation, Polygons, Sizes, and Difficulty Inputs · Behavior Case: Seeded Rng
summary: Random points self-intersect, seeds are global and hidden, small rocks award less but move impossibly, spawns overlap the ship, and difficulty grows without bound. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the seeded rng increment in seeded readable asteroid factory. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Inject a dedicated random generator and record seed and draw order without claiming cryptographic randomness.
If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-seeded-rng — Inject a dedicated random generator and record seed and draw order without claiming cryptographic randomness.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-generation-polygons-difficulty-5
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-generation-polygons-difficulty-5.
# Case 9036: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def worked_asteroids_generation_polygons_difficulty_5(vertices: int = 11, min_radius: float = 18.0, max_radius: float = 31.0, seeded_equal: bool = True, self_intersections: int = 0, spawn_budget: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "playerworked5",
        "seed9036",
        "input5dekrow",
        "frameworked59036",
        "state9036worked5",
        "playtest5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if vertices < 5 or min_radius <= 0.0 or max_radius < min_radius:
        return False, vertices, "polygon-domain"
    if not seeded_equal:
        return False, vertices, "rng-drift"
    if self_intersections > 0:
        return False, self_intersections, "invalid-polygon"
    if spawn_budget < 1:
        return False, spawn_budget, "spawn-budget"
    assert max_radius >= min_radius
    return True, spawn_budget, "seeded-asteroids"

# Evidence: asteroids-seeded-rng-fzh7fj
# Competency: asteroids-seeded-rng.
# Case 8092: a keyboard-only community arcade night.
# Operating constraint: keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def evidence_asteroids_seeded_rng_fzh7fj(vertices: int = 11, min_radius: float = 18.0, max_radius: float = 31.0, seeded_equal: bool = True, self_intersections: int = 0, spawn_budget: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "playerfzh7fj",
        "seed8092",
        "inputjf7hzf",
        "framefzh7fj8092",
        "state8092fzh7fj",
        "playtestjf7hzf8092",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_fzh7fj)) == 6
    if vertices < 5 or min_radius <= 0.0 or max_radius < min_radius:
        return False, vertices, "polygon-domain"
    if not seeded_equal:
        return False, vertices, "rng-drift"
    if self_intersections > 0:
        return False, self_intersections, "invalid-polygon"
    if spawn_budget < 1:
        return False, spawn_budget, "spawn-budget"
    assert max_radius >= min_radius
    return True, spawn_budget, "seeded-asteroids"

options.text: The Seeded Rng record says seeded readable asteroid factory looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect seeded rng evidence boundary for Seeded Rng.
